calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Petitioners: Raul Alejandro Argueta-Ramirez and Wendy Lizeth Vasquez are present in pro per with the minor: Jonathan Alejandro Argueta, were sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: Jonathan Alejandro Argueta-Vasquez.
Decree signed in open court.
